title: DIAMANTE Bud Vase 'Butterfly' - Small Hand Etched Crystal Vase with Butterfly Wildlife Flowers Pattern - 18cm gift packed Mother's Day (7 inches tall)
features: 📌 Artistic Craftsmanship: Hand-cut with a matte finish, this DIAMANTE bud vase features an intricate butterfly wildlife scene, showcasing quality glass and crystal artistry. The blown glass construction ensures lasting durability
📌 Elegant Bud Vase Design: Standing at 18cm tall, this vase is perfect for small flower arrangements or as a striking, unique decorative piece on its own

🇪🇺 Premium European Crystal: Crafted by us in Europe under strict EU regulations, this vase is safe for long-term use. It combines the highest quality crystal glass with traditional production practices for enduring beauty

🇬🇧 British Design, European Craftsmanship: Designed in Britain by DIAMANTE, with over 40 years of excellence, our creations fuse in-house proprietary British designs with the meticulous craftsmanship of centuries-old European glassmaking traditions
📏 Dimensions: Height: 18cm (7inches), making it an ideal size for accenting tabletops or mantels

Diamante showcase video Merchant video All your crystal needs covered Glasses & Tumblers We offer a wide variety of decorated and undecorated wine glasses, champagne flutes and saucers, short tumblers as well as hi balls. Vases & Bowls Our vases and bowls come in all shapes and sizes. They're great for flowers and bouquets or they make wonderful standalone decorations themselves Gifts All of our items are safely gift packaged ready to go. Whether it's a birthday, anniversary or just because, we offer a variety of decorated gifts Whisky Sets Bourbon, Scotch or Irish whisky? No matter which you prefer our whisky sets and tumblers are a great way to savour every sip Who is DIAMANTE? We are family based designers and producers of crystal from Bedfordshire. We specialise in uniquely decorated pieces and we also supply some prestigious crystal brands so it's likely you may have one of our glasses without even knowing! Why choose DIAMANTE crystal? We've been in the industry across multiple generations for over 35 years. Our pieces are made in the EU and the UK so not only is our glass made to the highest standards, but you can also be sure that our glasses are regulated and safe to drink from. What's the difference between crystal and glass? In general crystal has extra elements (lead in the older days) that make it considerably clearer and more refractive. Our techniques also allow for greater manipulation so we can make the glasses as thin or bulky as is required for a premium feel How are the items packaged? We have done countless drop tests to ensure the vases and glasses arrive safely. However accidents do happen and we are quick to replace anything that may arrive damaged on arrival. We also gift package 95% of our items so they are perfect gifts!
